arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez got the headlines but don't forget Liverpool game-changer who does things differently
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez was Liverpool's match winner against Brentford but he wasn't the only one to perform for the Reds in west London

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota 'out for weeks' as Arne Slot reveals what injury Liverpool striker has suffered
arts.sum: Arne Slot has confirmed Diogo Jota has suffered a muscle injury as the Liverpool boss backs Darwin Nunez to deputise for the Portugal striker in the coming weeks

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate confirms he has been offered new Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Reports in France over the last year claimed Liverpool had opened talks over a new contract, one of many Richard Hughes and Co. have to sort with 15 expiring between this summer and 2027. Ibrahima Konate has confirmed that he has been offered a new Liverpool contract, but would not offer any insight into whether he is close to signing it.

arts.ttl: Jota ruled out for several weeks as Liverpool manager Arne Slot provides injury update
arts.sum: The forward has already spent a spell on the sidelines this season and has suffered a muscular issue

arts.ttl: Curtis Jones makes notable Mohamed Salah comment after Eden Hazard admission
arts.sum: Curtis Jones appeared to land himself in hot water with Liverpool team-mate Mo Salah by claiming former Chelsea star Eden Hazard was a better player than the Reds' star attacker

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Arne Slot confirms injury timeline for Diogo Jota and Joe Gomez after injury blows
Liverpool’s Virgil van Dijk sends message of support to Real Madrid star
arts.sum: Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk has become the latest player to reveal his delight for Real Madrid defender David Alaba. This, of course, comes after the Austrian international secured his…

arts.ttl: Liverpool signing of IDEAL Salah replacement hinges on Rashford decision
arts.sum: According to Sacha Tavolieri, Borussia Dortmund see Bakayoko as an ideal replacement for Donyell Malen, provided that Marcus Rashford decides not to swap Man Utd for the German top club. Although Bakayoko is still linked to several top clubs, including Liverpool as a potential Mohamed Salah replacement, the Belgian winger is having a less successful season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: 'Decision made' on Harvey Elliott future amid speculation
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly make a decision over whether they would be open to offers for Harvey Elliott in either of the 2025 transfer windows.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher sums up Liverpool and Arsenal's 'different mentality' in title race
arts.sum: Arsenal have been involved in the title race for the last three seasons, twice running Manchester City close before seeing Liverpool standing in their way, as Jamie Carragher claimed they don't deal with pressure well
